titleStmt.title: SII 38.508: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 508. (A.R. No. 508 of 1912.) ŪṬṬATTŪR, LALGUDI TALUK, TIRUCHIRAPPALLI DISTRICT. On the south wall, Āṇḍavar shrine, Siddharatnēśvara temple.

p.hi: King: Jaṭāvarman Sundarapāṇḍya I Year 18, Tulā, śu. di. 10, Monday, Sadaiyam = 23rd October 1262 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription commences with the historical introduction Samasta jagadādhāra etc.

It records the nāṭṭavar of Kuṉṟa-kkūṟṟam-nāḍu in Uttaṅgatuṅga-vaḷanāḍu met in full quorum at the hall, called Uttamaśōḻaṉ-tirumaṇḍapam of Togumāmaṇi-nāyaṉar temple at Tiruūṟṟattūr in Ūṟṟattūr-nāḍu in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu. They donated the villages Iḍaimalai and Veṭṭuṇi, as tax-free, to a certain Āyaṉ Kavi Kumārar. It is stated that these villages were left fallow and its tanks were ruined for a long time and they were now entrusted to the donee to reclaim the forests, repair the tank and cultivate the lands. This grant was also engraved on the (walls of the) temple of Togumāmaṇi-nāyaṉār temple. Pulimiśaiyūr-uḍaiyāṉ Dēvaṉ Kāliṅgarāyaṉ, Kiḷiyūr-uḍaiyāṉ Vīragaṅgaṉ, Sāttanūr-uḍaiyāṉ Gurukularāyaṉ and others including the (silpāchāriyam) Āgāravallabha-Āchāriyaṉ and Nāṭṭāchāriyaṉ figure as signatories.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . smasamasta jagadādhāra somakulatilaka madhurāpuri mādhava keraḷa vamśa nirmmulana laṅkādpi paluṇḍana dvitiyarāma coḷakula śaila kuliśa kannāṭarājavidrāvaṇa kāṭakkarikūṭa pākala vividhari pūdurgga margga
naRead marddanavirakaṇḍakopāla vipinatāvadahana kāñcupūravarātīśvara gaṇapati hariṇa śārdula nelvura pūraviracita pirābhiṣeka praṇata rājāpratiṣṭhābhaka mahārājādhi rājaparameśvara śrīkoṟcaṭapaṉmarāṉa tiripu
vaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 8 tulā nāyaṟṟu pū pvaṣattu daśamiyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa cataiyattunāḷ vaṭakarai rā[ja*]rā[ja*]vaḷanāṭṭu Ūṟṟattūrnāṭṭu tiruū
ṟṟattūr Uṭaiyār tokumāmaṇināyaṉār koyil Uttamacoḻaṉ tirumaṇṭapattu Uttaṅkatuṅkavaḷanāṭṭu kuṉṟakkūṟṟattu nāṭṭu nāṭṭavarom niṟaivaṟaniṟaintu kuṟaivaṟakkūṭiiruntu
Ūṟṟattūr Āyaṉkavikumāraṟku nāṅkaḷ Ūraṭaṅkaiṟaiyiliyākak kuṭutta Ūrāvatu Iṭaimalaiyum veṭṭuṇiyum neṭunāḷ pāḻāyum kuḷamum Uṭaikuḷamāykkiṭakkaiyil Ivvūr Ivvāṇṭu mutal kāṭu
m veṭṭikkuḷamum Aṭaittu nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nattamum Uṭpaṭa naṉcey puṉcey Ūraṭaṅka Iṟaiyiliyāka tantatu Ippaṭikku cantirātittavaraiyum Iṟaiyiliyākat tantom Iccātaṉappaṭiye Uṭai
yāṉ tokumāmaṇināyaṉār koyilile kalveṭṭik koḷḷumpaṭi pāṟayate Ippaṭikku Ivai pulimicaiyūruṭaiyāṉ tevaṉ kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu kiḷiyūruṭaiyāṉ vīrakaṅkaṉ Eḻuttu cāttaṉūruṭaiyā
ṉ kurukularāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kāppu vira puṭaiyāṉ viḻuppātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai marutattūruṭaiyāṉ ceḻiyataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kuḷattūruṭaiyāṉ naraciṅkatevaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai muṉṉāḷ cāttaṉūruṭaiyāṉ camai
yaceṉāpati Eḻuttu Ivai kuṟukkaipāḻiyuṭaiyāṉ tiruvekampamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai melai Akkūruṭaiyāṉ tirucciṟṟampalaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Uḷvarimaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ vikkiramacoḻakuṉṟanāṭṭu ve
ḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Āṇmakaṉaraicūruṭaiyāṉ keraḷarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai Āṇmakaṉaraicūruṭaiyāṉ poṉṉampalanampi Eḻuttu Ivai kūṭalūruṭaiyāṉ nampi ceyvāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kuḷakkāṉattūruṭaiyāṉ
vilāṭarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vaḻutilampāṭiyuṭaiyāṉ kulottuṅka veḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai nāṭṭavarayāṇiyālRead nāṭṭavar paṇiyālnāṭṭuk kaṇakku taḻaṉvāyiluṭaiyāṉ miṉavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Ivai Iṉṉāṭṭuc cippācāriyam Ākāravallapa Ācāriyaṉ Eḻuttu §
Ippaṭikku Ivai Iṉṉāṭṭuccippācāriyam Ūṟṟattūr nāṭṭācāriyaṉ Eḻuttu . svastiśrī
Digital edition of SII 38.508 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
